blended.narrative: Bretton Woods is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 14 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
